title: The AI Skill I use to prevent refactors
summary: JavaScript Mastery discusses an AI-related skill or technique used to minimize the need for code refactoring. The video presents a practical approach to preventing refactors through AI application.
writeup: The video presents an AI-assisted development practice that JavaScript Mastery uses to reduce the need for later code refactoring. It frames the skill within the broader topic of AI-assisted coding, positioning planning ahead with AI as a way to avoid rework. A fuller discussion is pointed to at a jobpilot resource.
